name: @overwolf/types
description: Type definition file for autocompletion and documentation purposes

scripts.docs:mdx: npm run docs:clean && npm run docs:prepare-folders && node ./scripts/build-typedoc-options.js --in typedoc.mdx.json --out temp_typedoc/typedoc.mdx.json && npx typedoc --options temp_typedoc/typedoc.mdx.json && node ./scripts/organize-mdx-by-namespace.js --out docs/markdown/api && node ./scripts/fix-breadcrumb-links.js --out docs/markdown/api
scripts.docs:all: npm run docs:mdx && npm run docs:owads
